mapper.select:
SELECT t.transfer_id, t.task_id, t.from_assignee_type, CASE WHEN t.from_assignee_type = 'USER' THEN u_from.account WHEN t.from_assignee_type = 'ORGANIZATION' THEN team_from.team_name WHEN t.from_assignee_type = 'ROLE' THEN role_from.role_name ELSE '未知' END AS from_assignee_name, t.to_assignee_type, CASE WHEN t.to_assignee_type = 'USER' THEN u_to.account WHEN t.to_assignee_type = 'ORGANIZATION' THEN team_to.team_name WHEN t.to_assignee_type = 'ROLE' THEN role_to.role_name ELSE '未知' END AS to_assignee_name, u_operator.account AS operator, t.transferred_at, t.notes,
tn.from_status, tn.to_status, tn.handler_name, tn.note, tn.image_url, tn.attachment, tn.create_time FROM t_task_transfers t LEFT JOIN t_end_user u_from ON t.from_assignee_type = 'USER' AND t.from_assignee_id = u_from.id LEFT JOIN t_team team_from ON t.from_assignee_type = 'ORGANIZATION' AND t.from_assignee_id = team_from.id LEFT JOIN t_end_user_role role_from ON t.from_assignee_type = 'ROLE' AND t.from_assignee_id = role_from.role_id LEFT JOIN t_end_user u_to ON t.to_assignee_type = 'USER' AND t.to_assignee_id = u_to.id LEFT JOIN t_team team_to ON t.to_assignee_type = 'ORGANIZATION' AND t.to_assignee_id = team_to.id LEFT JOIN t_end_user_role role_to ON t.to_assignee_type = 'ROLE' AND t.to_assignee_id = role_to.role_id LEFT JOIN t_end_user u_operator ON t.transferred_by = u_operator.id LEFT JOIN t_task_notes tn ON t.transfer_id = tn.transfer_id WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY t.transferred_at ASC, tn.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_task_transfers (task_id, from_assignee_type, from_assignee_id, to_assignee_type, to_assignee_id, transferred_by, transferred_at, notes) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{fromAssigneeType}, #{fromAssigneeId}, #{toAssigneeType}, #{toAssigneeId}, #{transferredBy}, #{transferredAt}, #{notes})
